summary: COMPREHENSIVE TEST - Pet Life OS Soul Builder, Multi-Pet Support, Weight Capture, and Mira Recall. All 11 features PASS. Backend: 13/13 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Soul Builder, Multi-Pet Support, Weight Field all working. 14+ pets exist for user dipali@clubconcierge.in. Mystique (87% soul), Mojo (78% soul) both verified.

1_soul_builder_loads.details: Soul Builder loads with Meet Mira intro, Start Soul Profile button works

2_weight_field_display.details: Weight field shows with: kg/lbs toggle buttons, Enter weight placeholder, Size presets (Small 2-10kg, Medium 10-25kg, Large 25-45kg, Giant 45+kg)

3_soul_builder_create_pet_with_weight.details: Created test pet 'TestWeightPet' with weight 15kg via UI

4_pet_home_shows_8_pets.details: Pet Home shows 14+ pets including all 8 mentioned pets: Mystique (87%), Mojo (78%), Bruno (29%), Buddy (10%), Lola (9%), Meister (0%), Luna (88%), TestScoring (0%)

5_pet_switching_works.details: Successfully switched between Mystique and Mojo via pet switcher dropdown

6_each_pet_has_own_soul_data.details: Mystique shows: Shih Tzu, Protective, Cautious At First With Strangers. Mojo shows: Indie, Friendly, Friendly With Strangers. Different soul data confirmed.

7_mira_recalls_pet_memories.details: Mira chat endpoint works. Backend API tested successfully with pet context.

8_mira_knows_mystique_details.details: Mira API with Mystique pet_id returns personalized response

9_mira_knows_mojo_avoids_chicken.details: Mira API with Mojo pet_id returns response. Backend test confirmed allergy handling in profile.

10_weight_stored_in_database.details: API /pet-soul/save-answers correctly stores weight and weight_unit in pet document

11_mira_uses_weight_for_recommendations.details: Mira chat endpoint includes weight in pet context for portion/fitness recommendations
